steps: Day 1 costs $430. Each additional day costs $215. For $x$ days there are $(x-1)$ additional days.
choiceAnalysis:
• Choice A — '$y=215x+215$': $x=1 \Rightarrow y=430$ ✓, $x=2 \Rightarrow y=645$ ✓. Matches the pricing structure. ✓
  • Choice B — '$y=430x-215$': $x=1 \Rightarrow y=215$, but first day costs $430. ✗
  • Choice C — '$y=430x+215$': $x=1 \Rightarrow y=645$, but first day costs $430. ✗
  • Choice D — '$y=215x+430$': $x=1 \Rightarrow y=645$, but first day costs $430. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
